name: GPS Participacoes e Empreendimentos S.A.
summary: GPS Participa√É¬ß√É¬µes e Empreendimentos S.A. provides security, facilities, logistics, utility engineering, industrial services, catering, and infrastructure services in Brazil. Its security services include property security, firefighting and prevention, personal security, armed escort, event security, integrated security solution, monitoring center operation, and civil aviation security services. The company's facilities services comprise cleaning and conservation, operational support, technical and industrial cleaning, caterers and servers, hospital cleaning and sanitizing, building maintenance, reception desk and gatehouse, administrative support, firefighting, specialized, landscaping and plant maintenance, and indoor waste management services. It also installs, operates, and maintains utility systems; offers indoor logistics and industrial maintenance services; and operates restaurants. In addition, the company offers airport and port infrastructure, and highway maintenance and conservation services; and gas pipelines and distribution, sanitation, mining, railroad, and energy infrastructure and maintenance services. The company was founded in 1962 and is headquartered in S√É¬£o Paulo, Brazil.
